overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in winter gear exploring a snowy mountain resort area, walking from a snow ramp past wooden chalet-style buildings and eventually onto a paved road with snow-capped peaks in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow ramp area beside resort buildings

events.description: character turns left to navigate around the snow ramp structure
moves from open ramp area into narrow passage between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a large snow ramp structure, navigating around the side of a wooden chalet building

entered.detail: large white snow ramp with blue stripes on the sides, used for winter sports
two-story wooden building with brown siding and white trim windows
tall evergreen trees scattered on the snowy hillside
towering snow-covered mountain range in the background

segments.scene_description: The character begins near a large snow ramp structure in a mountain resort area, walking alongside it with a wooden chalet building on the right and pine trees on the left. The snow-capped mountains dominate the background as the character navigates around the ramp and moves between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy path between wooden fence and resort buildings

events.description: character continues along the narrow path between fence and building

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow snowy path between a wooden fence on the left and chalet-style buildings on the right

entered.detail: tall wooden plank fence running alongside the path
wooden building with red-trimmed balconies and large windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snowy passage with a wooden fence on the left and chalet buildings with balconies on the right. The large snow ramp is now behind as the character progresses deeper into the resort area between structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with mountain views approaching paved road

events.description: approaching paved road, ground surface changes from snow to asphalt ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across open snow toward a paved road with expansive views of the snow-capped mountain range

entered.detail: wet asphalt road with yellow dividing lines and street lamps
tall modern street lamp with single fixture

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow path, the character walks across an open snow field with the mountain range prominently visible ahead. A paved road comes into view in the distance, and the wooden fence falls behind as the character approaches the road transition.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved mountain road with parked vehicles and resort buildings

events.description: character steps onto paved road and continues walking along the wet asphalt

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet paved road passing parked vehicles and street lamps with mountain views ahead

entered.detail: white van parked beside the chalet building
dark colored sedan parked on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto the wet paved road, leaving the deep snow behind. Parked vehicles including a white van and black car line the road, while street lamps and additional chalet buildings frame the scene with the majestic snow-capped mountains still visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain resort that transitions from a dense cluster of chalets to an open paved road. It begins beside a large snow ramp, moving between pine trees and wooden buildings with towering snow-capped mountains dominating the background. As the character progresses, the scene narrows into a snowy passage flanked by a wooden fence and balconies before opening up into a wide, white field. The camera then follows the character across this open expanse toward a distant road, leaving the fences and deep snow behind. Finally, the movement transitions onto a wet paved road lined with parked vehicles and street lamps, while the majestic mountain range remains visible in the distance.
